---
title: "Movies"
format: html
---

| Date | name | Link | Rewatchable Link | Rating | Comment |
|------------|------------|------------|------------|------------|------------|
| 2026-04-04 | Sneakers | <https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0105435/> | <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xQJlUq-Ghuc> | 7 | Solid movie for the 1990s tries to be too cute. |
| 2026-03-28 | O Brother Where Art thou? | <https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0190590/reviews/?featured=rw2182204&ref_=tt_ururv_c_1_hd> |  | 6 | It is a slow movie and I have feeling it is good but had a hard time loving it. |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |
